# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

cat: snapshots
snapshot repo:
  path: "/var/snap/elasticsearch/common/data/indices"
  readonly: false
  locations:
    - name: s3-location
      type: fs
      path: /mnt/snapshot/
      options:
        compress: true

settings:
  max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 100mb
  max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 100mb
  script:
    store_type: "s3"
    bucket: "elasticsearch-snapshots"

snapshot retention policy:
  enabled: true
  period: '14d'
